name: Diabetic Salad Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 Packages orange jello (with NutraSweet), 3 oz each
1 Cup fruit juice from oranges and pineapple
1 Small Can frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
1 Package instant lemon pudding mix (with NutraSweet), 3 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the orange jello with very hot water; stir until dissolved.
2. Add fruit juice from oranges and pineapple, then add orange juice.
3. Add Mandarin oranges and pineapple chunks to a 9 x 12-inch size pan.
4. Refrigerate until set.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the pudding mix with milk until thick.
6. Add at least 4 ounces of Cool Whip and spread over top of chilled jello.
7. If lemon instant pudding is not available, use vanilla pudding with a little lemon flavoring to taste.
